description: Multiple SQL injection vulnerabilities in enVivo!CMS allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands and gain privileges via the (1) username or (2) password parameters to admin_login.asp, or the (3) searchstring and possibly (4) ID parameters to default.asp.
